vocab.meaning: âm thanh êm dịu, ngọt ngào
vocab.example: I am particularly fond of the mellow acoustics of a nylon-string guitar playing in a quiet room.

vocab.meaning: tiếng thình thịch có nhịp điệu
vocab.example: The rhythmic thumping of the train on the tracks always puts me into a meditative state during long journeys.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ầm ầm từ xa (thường là sấm sét hoặc xe cộ)
vocab.example: There is something incredibly cozy about hearing the distant rumble of thunder while being tucked away safely indoors.
The gentle rustle of wind through the pine trees is a sound that instantly grounds me in nature.

vocab.meaning: sức mạnh gợi cảm xúc/kỷ niệm (của âm thanh)
vocab.example: The sound of waves has a strange evocative power, reminding me of childhood holidays by the shore.

vocab.meaning: tiếng hót líu lo, du dương
vocab.example: I wake up every morning to the melodious chirping of birds, which is far better than any artificial alarm.

vocab.meaning: những tông giọng/âm thanh khẽ khàng, không phô trương
vocab.example: I enjoy the subdued tones of a cello; it sounds much more sophisticated and soulful than higher-pitched instruments.
I love how the sound of a large bell reverberates through the valley, creating a sense of timelessness.
The sound of rushing water from a nearby stream is the perfect white noise for helping me concentrate on my studies.

vocab.meaning: độ trung thực cao (âm thanh sắc nét, chất lượng)
vocab.example: As an audiophile, I take great pleasure in listening to high-fidelity recordings where you can hear every breath of the performer.
